title: Home builder stocks enjoy broad gains as Treasury yields fall to 1-month low
text: Shares of home builders were broadly higher Friday, as the continued drop in longer-term Treasury yields helped soothe some fears about home affordability. The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF ITB, +4.17% ran up 4.3% with all 47 equity components trading higher, while the S&P 500 SPX, +0.70% edged up 0.7%.
